checkin.journal:
Slept okeyish - my boniko hurts when sitting for some reason idk why
Morning snorkeling at the beach a bit a way - was super duper nice, managed to snorkel with my dad
Breakfast
Worked a bit meeting for cureLink - maybe a good name would be AskMedGuru
Packed
Lunchy
Showered
Traveling back to Mahe
Takamaka rum so good we bought some souvenirs
We boarded before midnight plane for Dubai
Very nice last day, did some things for work but also had an amazing morning
Inspired by: fishes at morning snork
